title: Access Point Join Process
subtitle: How a Cisco Lightweight Access Point joins a Wireless LAN Controller

steps.title: Boot Process
steps.desc: The Access Point powers on and loads its operating system.

steps.title: IP Address
steps.desc: The AP obtains an IP address from the DHCP server.

steps.title: WLC Discovery
steps.desc: The AP discovers available Wireless LAN Controllers using DHCP, DNS or Broadcast.

steps.title: CAPWAP Join
steps.desc: The AP establishes a CAPWAP tunnel with the selected controller.

steps.title: Configuration Download
steps.desc: The AP downloads WLAN, RF and policy configurations from the controller.

steps.title: Operational State
steps.desc: The AP becomes active and starts serving wireless clients.
